item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: Wonder Woman & Cheetah body paint on myself - MCroft07
item.description: Had a cool comment on my Instagram to consider doing Wonder Woman x Cheetah and I can never resist a Wonder Woman body paint so here she is! Thanks @srb_in_the_303 on IG for the cool idea! Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m currently in the middle of spray painting my Doom Slayer helmet I just 3d printed out! Missed some parts though, got to print out more details later. Excited for the new game! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.dc:creator: butterda

item.title: A dress for a Sorceress
item.description:
Finished product first!
It was time to design a sew a representative dress for my larp witcher sorceress. Inspirations are many, and the theme is powerful, feminine, slutty with a purpose.
This was my design. Total free form, I am not a seamstress, but a motivated larper!
Sooooooo much fabric
Got creative with the back design to keep the boobies covered with minimum effort.
Lots of embroidery for the coat...
And there she is!
Fits like a glove, but still much scratchy on the inside. Gonna line that with strategically placed fabric scraps. Have a great day and keep on crafting!

item.title: The very first video played on MTV.
item.description: MTV, short for Music Television, is an American cable channel that originally launched on August 1, 1981. It was created with the concept of broadcasting music videos hosted by on-air personalities known as “video jockeys” or VJs. Its debut marked a significant shift in how music was consumed, giving artists a new visual platform to promote their work. The first video ever played on MTV was “Video Killed the Radio Star” by The Buggles, a symbolic nod to the changing media landscape. In the 1980s and early 1990s, MTV played a major role in shaping pop culture, influencing fashion, language, and trends among young audiences.

item.title: coyotes
item.description:
1..... Coyotes are an important part of the ecosystem and humans have taken away too many wild spaces. Just a reminder that coyotes can scale fences. And not to leave your pets unattended. vid source: siobhancatherine on tt
2..... A coyote and a badger use a culvert as a wildlife crossing to pass under a busy California highway. Coyotes and badgers can be observed hunting together. Badgers will dig for burrowing prey, while the coyote keeps an eye out for escaping prey since they're more suited for chasing them down.
3.....
4.....
5.....
6.....
7.....
8.....
